name: AAA - Comprehensive Provider Query (Multi-Resource)
description: Provider-level query identifying all AAA patients via Condition (AAA dx) + Procedure (AAA repair).
prompt: I need to identify my complete abdominal aortic aneurysm patient population for a vascular surgery quality initiative. Some patients have a coded AAA diagnosis. Others may have only an AAA repair procedure on record. Run multiple FHIR queries — diagnosis and AAA repair procedures — and union the patient sets.

prompts.broad: Find all AAA patients — by diagnosis (including ruptured) or by repair procedure (open or endovascular). Run multiple queries and union the patient sets.
prompts.expert: Run two queries. (1) Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|233985008,http://snomed.info/sct|14336007 — AAA dx variants. (2) Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|24165007,http://snomed.info/sct|441788006 — AAA repair. Union the patient IDs.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Multi-query union: Condition + Procedure for AAA.

required_codes.display: Open repair of abdominal aortic aneurysm with graft
Endovascular repair of abdominal aortic aneurysm
